comment: 41yo male, asymptomatic, no personal cancer diagnosis. Father diagnosed with renal cell carcinoma at 64 (no germline testing on file). Single first-degree relative with cancer, pedigree not yet systematically evaluated. Engine fires RF-UNIVERSAL-FIRST-DEGREE-CANCER-FAMILY-ANY (universal pre-triage flag) → routes to PreventionPlan: structured pedigree review (Tyrer-Cuzick / BOADICEA / PREMM5 / MMRpro depending on family profile) + general genetic-counseling referral. Most likely downstream is documentation of negative-pedigree determination rather than disease-specific genetic-RF activation. Validates v0.3 universal pre-triage RF — relevant_diseases=["*"], engine attaches no anchored Indication tracks (sidecar documentation only).
